# AI Video Style Transfer

## Overview
Create unique videos with our AI Video Filters and Effects. Easily enhance each video with stunning AI styles. AI Video Filters with Instant Transformation. Experience a seamless transformation with AI video filters that apply stunning effects instantly. Choose from an array of unique styles, including pop art, retro, anime, and more, to add depth and creativity to every frame.

Sample usage cases:
![](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/dt_yce_video_style_transfer_S1_video_1_0_6d571a8bbb.jpg)

![](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/yce_web_video_style_transfe_S2_feature_03_0_6dd652a6f2.jpg)

---

### File Specs & Errors

* Supported Formats & Dimensions

|AI Feature|Supported Dimensions|Supported File Size|Supported Formats|
|  ----  | ----  | ----  | ----  |
| AI Video Face Swap | The input video must not exceed 30 seconds, 4K resolution, or 30 FPS, and the output is limited to 1280 long-side resolution, 16 FPS, and up to 30 seconds. | Length limit: 30s | container: mov, mp4 <br>video: MPEG-4, MPEG-4 AVC, <br>audio: aac, amr, mp3 |

* Error Codes

|Error Code|Description|
|  ----  | ----  |
| error_download_video | Download source video error |
| error_decode_video | Decode source video error |
| error_unsupported_video | Unsupported video format |
| exceed_max_filesize | Input file size exceeds the maximum limit|
| error_nsfw_content_detected | NSFW content detected in the source file |
| error_decode_mask | Decode mask image error |
| invalid_parameter | Invalid parameter value|

## Reference

- **API version:** V1.0
- **OpenAPI version:** 3.0.0
- **Source:** [OpenAPI description](https://docs.perfectcorp.com/_bundle/reference/ai_video_style_transfer.yaml)
- **Servers:** `https://yce-api-01.makeupar.com`

## Authentication

| Name | Type | Scheme / Location | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| BearerAuthenticationV2 | http | bearer | Use the standard 'Bearer authentication'. Put your 'API Key' in header: `Authorization:Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`. Notice that there is ' ' a space between 'Bearer' and the 'YOUR_API_KEY'. |

## Endpoints

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/file/video-trans`
**Create a new file.**

To upload a new file, you'll first need to use the File API. It will give you a URL – use that URL to upload your file. Once the upload is finished, you can use the file_id from the same response to start using our AI features.

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** · required

**Schema:** `VideoFileV1.1`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `files` | `array<object>` | Yes | — |
| `files.content_type` | `string` | Yes | Content MIME type for this file. Currently available values are listed in the enum. |
| `files.file_name` | `string` | Yes | Name of this file |
| `files.file_size` | `integer` | Yes | Content length for this file in bytes. Should not be larger than 100MB. |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful retrieval of file upload information

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicVideoFileResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `files` | `array<object>` | No | — |
| `files.content_type` | `string` | No | Content MIME type for this file. |
| `files.file_name` | `string` | No | Name of this file |
| `files.file_id` | `string` | No | ID of this file. Other run task API will need this \`file_id\`. |
| `files.requests` | `array<object>` | No | Using upload \`url\`, \`headers\`, \`method\` below to upload file. After completion, the \`file_id\` is used to proceed with calling run task API. |
| `files.requests.headers` | `object` | No | Headers to include when uploading the file |
| `files.requests.url` | `string` | No | URL to upload this file |
| `files.requests.method` | `string` | No | HTTP method to upload this file |

**400** — Invalid request parameters

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |
| `error_code` | `string` | No | — |

**401** — Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

### `GET` `/s2s/v2.0/task/template/video-trans`
**List predefined templates.**

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `page_size` | query | `integer` | No | Number of results to return in this page. Valid value should be between 1 and 20. Default 20. |
| `starting_token` | query | `string` | No | Token for current page. Start with `null` for the first page, and use `next_token` from the previous response to start next page |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful retrieval of styles

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.templates` | `array<Template>` | No | — |
| `data.templates.id` | `string` | No | The ID of the template. Use this as \`template_id\` when run task. |
| `data.templates.thumb` | `string` | No | The thumbnail of style. |
| `data.templates.title` | `string` | No | The title of the template. |
| `data.templates.category_name` | `string` | No | The category name of the template. |
| `data.next_token` | `string` | No | Token to query next page. |

**400** — Invalid request parameters

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |
| `error_code` | `string` | No | — |

**401** — Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/task/video-trans`
**Run an AI Style Transfer (video) task.**

AI tasks are asynchronous. Prefer webhook-based completion handling when the feature supports webhooks. Configure your webhook endpoint, verify webhook signatures, and use the received `task_id` to query the task result after a `success` or `error` notification. See the [webhook integration guide](/develop/webhook.md) for setup and verification details.

If webhooks are not supported for the feature, or if your integration cannot use webhooks, implement polling. After starting an AI task, keep polling the task status endpoint at the given `polling_interval` until the task status is either `success` or `error`.

Do not stop polling a running task for longer than the allowed polling window. If the task is not polled in time, the task may expire; a later status check can return `InvalidTaskId` even if processing finished, and the consumed units may still be charged.

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** · required

**Schema:** `RunWithSingleTemplate & BasicRunTaskV2VidSrcFileUrl | BasicRunTaskV2SrcFileId & object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `template_id` | `string` | Yes | ID of the template. List predefined templates first, and use the id of a template. |
| `src_file_url` | `string` | Yes | Url of the file to run task. The url should be publicly accessible. |
| `src_file_id` | `string` | Yes | ID of file to run task. File ID from upload file API. |
| `dst_duration` | `integer` | Yes | The length of video in seconds |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful execution of the task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicRunTaskResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | — |
| `data.task_id` | `string` | No | ID of this task. Task result is valid to query by this ID for 24 hours. |

**400** — Failed execution of task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `RunError`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidParameters \| CreditInsufficiency \| InvalidStyleGroup \| InvalidStyle \| BadRequest` | No | Error code:   * InvalidParameters - Invalid request parameters   * CreditInsufficiency - Insufficient unit to run   * BadRequest - Unexpected request parameter   * InvalidStyleGroup - Invalid style group id   * InvalidStyle - Invalid style id |

**401** — Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

**429** — Too many requests

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |

| `url` | `string` | No | URL to download this result. Valid for 2 hours |
